column1: Hey Sydney, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Bet! Which destination were we lookin at?
word Cabo is def the most popular rn
how many ppl in your group so far?
It will be maximum 9 of us
word, soiid group, is everyone from the same school?
Putting this info together for you now, how soon were you lookin to get something situated?
whats up sydney, whats the best email to send the cabo options to? got it all together for you
just sent that over lmk if you got it
whats up Sydney did that email ever get to you? just wanna make sure
hey any word on what we want to do for spring break?
heyy Sydney you still lookin for help with spring break or you good
whats up Sydney did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
My friend is actually texting you about us planning it, we are wanting punta Cana
ahh okay cool got you, think we texted last week. y'all still workin on getting the group together?
hey hey hope thanksgiving was dope. how are things lookin for you and Kylee for spring break
Hey, yes we are still looking for spring break and wanting punta Cana for like 6 people 15th to 20th
I'll send you the updated pricing. When were yall lookin to start getting things booked
Like soon how much would it be
I can slide yall on the cyber Monday deal. $699 for the 5 nights, our Occidental Punta Cana all inclusive package
Ok wait that sounds rlly good can u email me the details
Yea fs. We'd have to move kinda quick tho cause the deal kinda over rn lol
Ill email it in 10 if that's cool
hey my b on the delay just sent that over
Mind checking your spam or promotions folder? Sometimes it gets filtered there since it has pricing in the email body
Perfect! Just sent it to everyone! We will prob book either tmr or the next day
How do we go about booking

I'll set up your reservation link first thing in the am. Each of you will hop on and hit 'join trip' on one of the open slots. It'll prompt you through creating an account and making your deposit to secure the spot

Liked “I'll set up your reservation link first thing in the am. Each of you will hop on and hit 'join trip' on one of the open slots. It'll prompt you through creating an account and making your deposit to secure the spot”
whats upp were y'all all ready to get things in motion? ill send over the res if so
Ok it will either be 7,8, or 9 (9 is maximum)
7 people are 100% and we are waiting on 3 people
bet we'll start with 8 for now and adjust from there afterward
that way the 7 can get on now
I emailed that over did it get to you? hopefully it didnt hit spam again
Kk did u send it from the same email I don't have it
gonna text it to you here but I'll try sending the email again since it has a deeper breakdown on how to get on and navigate through the res
wassup syd! y'all still plan on hoppin on the reservation?
Yes doing it rn! We have 7 people final. So can we do a 4 person room and a 3 person room
Yea I got you. I'll make the adjustment rn
Wait, I'm so sorry we found out another person so it could be 8😥😥😥 sorry I know we keep changing it
But we are 100% doing it today
You're the best sorry we are so difficult! It's gonna be so fun!
Lol yea def. lookin forward to meetin y'all
rooms should be all set now tho
From the same link as before?
For that reservation it says March 7th thru the 12th but it is supposed to be 15th- 20th
just saw that. hit refresh on the page, should be all good now
We're trying to deal with the flights now, and it said that there would be transportation from the airport which airport has transportation to our resort
once you get your flight info, enter it into your account
our ops team will take it from there and we'll be ready for you when you land
Hey! We put all of our flight information in and we are all set but we are split into 2 rooms and wanted to make sure we were in rooms near each other! Thanks
fire! so when you get to the resort you can request two rooms next to each other, thats on the resort side of things
Hi! Do you know how to make a reservation for the restaurants? It is a call or do it when we get there?
yo! yea its a do it when you get there kinda thing. first come first serve, they dont allow pre scheduling before check in
Do we have to do an application for an e ticket?
hey is Lorelei on the same flight as anyone?
Yes we are all on the same flight!
also did y'all wanna add any party pass tickets to your packages?
We are 50/50 on additional party packages. I think we are just gonna get there and see if we need to I guess if that makes sense
Did lorelei not fill out the flight info? We all got our tickets together, so like one person bought all of our tickets.
okay cool. everyones all set with flights now
I didn't get this email bc my email is sgd55555@yahoo.com
And I can't print my voucher with out it. Thanks 🙏
hey you can print your voucher still. just log into your account thats where the vouchers are
have you been able to log in?
Yes! I just didn't know if I needed my email
The QR code doesn't show up on the download, will that be a problem?
yooo Sydney safe travels today. lookin forward to havin y'all here
Thank you! We are all at the airport!
Hi! I am wondering if my group of 8 are able to do the booze cruise on Wednesday. How can we sign up if we are still able to? Also do you know what time would we be back to the resort? Thank you!
Hey! Yea just head down to the lobby to the Go Blue hospitality desk and let them know you'd like to buy a booze cruise ticket
Usually back on the resort around 330
